title: R@zown #7331
definition:
Rezon = "prince"

 1) son of Eliadah, a Syrian, who lead a band of freebooters and
    established a petty kingdom at Damascus in the time of David and
    Solomon
nasbUsage:
Definition: Rezon = "prince"

 1) son of Eliadah, a Syrian, who lead a band of freebooters and
    established a petty kingdom at Damascus in the time of David and
    Solomon

    NASB:  an Aramean (Syrian) of Solomons time
